ab: nacila tayza pipacakayan misiwbay kaku acibai, yadah ku nikelidan ni bai tu nipalumaan niza tayza, misanga’ aca tu asu’ay a kakanan nu Yincumin pabeli tu katuuday.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: manamuh ku katuuday tu pipacakayan nibai, katuud ku micakayay tu kakulut nasu atu daydam, katuud ku tayniay a tademaw mitanam tu nisalami’an niza.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，苦瓜和辣椒很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the bitter gourd and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: asu’ kaen ku nisalami’an niza tu pahku atu hakhak, izaw henay nisalami’an tu kiwmah a titi makaw silaw, malilid nu sanek ku katuuday a labang, tayni amin ku katuuday misilsil tu pipacakayan niyam.
ch: 她煮的過貓和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告醃肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: misalami’ cibabi hawsa, i tapiingan kaku mikawih tu labang. tunutuwa’ sa kaku i tapiingan, “nu uzip amin nipalumaan a lami’, cayay ku nipasapayuan, kabili tayni micakay yu!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: kalamkamen amamin tu mapacakay ku tuud niyam, sakamu sa cibai, “zayhan hatu nipipadang isu.”
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: uyni a kawaw, mananam tu kaku makayniay Yincumin nu mulangaway atu kakanen a natinengan, saca mataneng tu ngelu’ nu pipacakayan.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: maazih tu ku kanamuh nibai tu sakay babalaki a kakanan, tada malemed atu paseneng.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常幸福和驕傲。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
